TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: "kitakit sangelu'ay a kawaw" paymihecaan caay pacena' nai' aca ku nademidadan,nika katuud ku tademaw ku misakawaway(2) "kuni hicahan tu hakiya?a izawtu kumakaydihay a tademaw misakawaw kanca nayay ku kalisiw?"hang,nika mamin i kitakit tatenga izaw ku cacay bataan I'k ku tademaw ku mikuliay hananay a misakakawaway aizaw maydih yaca amatieng,hakiya cima ku maydihay amikawaw tu mahiniay mangelu' aca inayay ku kawlah nu misakakawaway?patukil hang:"wina min". "mamin i kitakian sangeluay a kawaw"tahadauc amisakakawaw azihan sa izaw adidi' a paceba milawlaw, mayza u tatengaay.namakayza malingatu pilecuhan tu wawa ademiad,mababeli tu tadahadauc a ngangan "wina",namakaza name cucu nay a wawa,tangasa taneng malingatu ami sakamu itisuwanan,na malaliyas malawlaw,amalemu'ay tu cacudadan nu cabay,na cacay aca miliyas tu luma' micudad,tamala cacay teked a buka a tademaw,atu haymaw satu u wawa izaw tu nikauzip nu luma' "kuyni mamin i kitakit sangelu'ay a kawaw" a taneng tangasatu mipazeng? wina, mahini tahadauc satu! nazikuzada iga,umikilimatu kakulian malilid ku balucu',mukamumin a pahkal tu i balucu'ay a mikukay tu pakayniay i wina,kuyni caay pabaliw tunian kitakit u sangelu'ay a kawaw,nika kamu sakay wina, akay uyza i kitakitay ku malemeday a kawaw!pipada'su i hekalaymin a wina!
S.PHON: "kitakit saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw" pajmińß…ô ¶aan ¶aaj pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° nai Ē~ ° a ¶a ku nad…ômidadan,nika katuud ku tad…ômaw ku misakawawaj(*) "kuni ńßi ¶ańßan tu ńßakija?a izawtu kumakajdińßaj a tad…ômaw misakawaw kan ¶a najaj ku kar~…ĺisiw?"ńßaŇč,nika mamin i kitakit tat…ôŇča izaw ku ¶a ¶aj bataan i Ē~ °k ku tad…ômaw ku mikur~…ĺiaj ńßananaj a misakakawawaj aizaw majdińß ja ¶a amati…ôŇč,ńßakija ¶ima ku majdińßaj amikawaw tu mańßiniaj maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° a ¶a inajaj ku kawr~…ĺańß nu misakakawawaj?patukir~…ĺ ńßaŇč:"wina min". "mamin i kitakian saŇč…ôr~…ĺuaj a kawaw"tańßadau ¶ amisakakawaw azińßan sa izaw adidi Ē~ ° a pa ¶…ôba mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw, majza u tat…ôŇčaaj.namakajza mar~…ĺiŇčatu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu wawa ad…ômiad,mabab…ôr~…ĺi tu tadańßadau ¶ a ŇčaŇčan "wina",namakaza nam…ô ¶u ¶u naj a wawa,taŇčasa tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu ami sakamu itisuwanan,na mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw,amar~…ĺ…ômu Ē~ °aj tu ¶a ¶udadan nu ¶abaj,na ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mi ¶udad,tamar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj t…ôk…ôd a buka a tad…ômaw,atu ńßajmaw satu u wawa izaw tu nikauzip nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "kujni mamin i kitakit saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw" a tan…ôŇč taŇčasatu mipaz…ôŇč? wina, mańßini tańßadau ¶ satu! nazikuzada iga,umikir~…ĺimatu kakur~…ĺian mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,mukamumin a pańßkar~…ĺ tu i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a mikukaj tu pakajniaj i wina,kujni ¶aaj pabar~…ĺiw tunian kitakit u saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw,nika kamu sakaj wina, akaj ujza i kitakitaj ku mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj a kawaw!pipada Ē~ °su i ńß…ôkar~…ĺajmin a wina!
S.FORM: "kitakit sangelu'ay a kawaw" paymihecaan caay pacena' nai' aca ku nademidadan,nika katuud ku tademaw ku misakawaway(2) "kuni hicahan tu hakiya?a izawtu kumakaydihay a tademaw misakawaw kanca nayay ku kalisiw?"hang,nika mamin i kitakit tatenga izaw ku cacay bataan I'k ku tademaw ku mikuliay hananay a misakakawaway aizaw maydih yaca amatieng,hakiya cima ku maydihay amikawaw tu mahiniay mangelu' aca inayay ku kawlah nu misakakawaway?patukil hang:"wina min". "mamin i kitakian sangeluay a kawaw"tahadauc amisakakawaw azihan sa izaw adidi' a paceba milawlaw, mayza u tatengaay.namakayza malingatu pilecuhan tu wawa ademiad,mababeli tu tadahadauc a ngangan "wina",namakaza name cucu nay a wawa,tangasa taneng malingatu ami sakamu itisuwanan,na malaliyas malawlaw,amalemu'ay tu cacudadan nu cabay,na cacay aca miliyas tu luma' micudad,tamala cacay teked a buka a tademaw,atu haymaw satu u wawa izaw tu nikauzip nu luma' "kuyni mamin i kitakit sangelu'ay a kawaw" a taneng tangasatu mipazeng? wina, mahini tahadauc satu! nazikuzada iga,umikilimatu kakulian malilid ku balucu',mukamumin a pahkal tu i balucu'ay a mikukay tu pakayniay i wina,kuyni caay pabaliw tunian kitakit u sangelu'ay a kawaw,nika kamu sakay wina, akay uyza i kitakitay ku malemeday a kawaw!pipada'su i hekalaymin a wina!
S.PHON: "kitakit saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw" pajmińß…ô ¶aan ¶aaj pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° nai Ē~ ° a ¶a ku nad…ômidadan,nika katuud ku tad…ômaw ku misakawawaj(*) "kuni ńßi ¶ańßan tu ńßakija?a izawtu kumakajdińßaj a tad…ômaw misakawaw kan ¶a najaj ku kar~…ĺisiw?"ńßaŇč,nika mamin i kitakit tat…ôŇča izaw ku ¶a ¶aj bataan i Ē~ °k ku tad…ômaw ku mikur~…ĺiaj ńßananaj a misakakawawaj aizaw majdińß ja ¶a amati…ôŇč,ńßakija ¶ima ku majdińßaj amikawaw tu mańßiniaj maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° a ¶a inajaj ku kawr~…ĺańß nu misakakawawaj?patukir~…ĺ ńßaŇč:"wina min". "mamin i kitakian saŇč…ôr~…ĺuaj a kawaw"tańßadau ¶ amisakakawaw azińßan sa izaw adidi Ē~ ° a pa ¶…ôba mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw, majza u tat…ôŇčaaj.namakajza mar~…ĺiŇčatu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu wawa ad…ômiad,mabab…ôr~…ĺi tu tadańßadau ¶ a ŇčaŇčan "wina",namakaza nam…ô ¶u ¶u naj a wawa,taŇčasa tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu ami sakamu itisuwanan,na mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw,amar~…ĺ…ômu Ē~ °aj tu ¶a ¶udadan nu ¶abaj,na ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mi ¶udad,tamar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj t…ôk…ôd a buka a tad…ômaw,atu ńßajmaw satu u wawa izaw tu nikauzip nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° "kujni mamin i kitakit saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw" a tan…ôŇč taŇčasatu mipaz…ôŇč? wina, mańßini tańßadau ¶ satu! nazikuzada iga,umikir~…ĺimatu kakur~…ĺian mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,mukamumin a pańßkar~…ĺ tu i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a mikukaj tu pakajniaj i wina,kujni ¶aaj pabar~…ĺiw tunian kitakit u saŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw,nika kamu sakaj wina, akaj ujza i kitakitaj ku mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj a kawaw!pipada Ē~ °su i ńß…ôkar~…ĺajmin a wina!
